title: Units collection GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of a collection of units.

collection.description: The array containing all the units on the agreement.

items.title: Unit
items.description: A specific unit on the agreement.

unitNumber.description: A unique identifier of the unit.

self.description: A unique link reference to the unit item.

metaData.description: Information about possible actions, endpoints and resource paths related to the endpoint.

self.description: The unique self reference of the units collection.
